description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a gently reclined seat and backrest, both of which are segmented into horizontal padded sections for ergonomic comfort. The upholstery is a light gray color, contrasting with the angular, wooden frame that supports the seat and extends to form the legs. The frame is constructed from what appears to be a medium-toned wood, with a green accent panel visible along the sides and back. The legs are splayed and intersect at sharp angles, providing both stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The backrest is tall and straight, offering full support for the upper body, while the seat is elongated to allow for lounging. There are no visible armrests, emphasizing the open and streamlined silhouette.
description: A modern chaise with a segmented gray cushion, angular wooden frame, and green accent panel, designed for ergonomic lounging. The piece features a tall backrest and splayed legs, with no armrests for a sleek, open look.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the segmented gray cushion, the angular wooden frame, and the green accent panel along the side.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the full length of the seat, the tall backrest, and the intersecting wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear-right view emphasizing the green accent panel on the back and the angular construction of the wooden frame.
description_view_3: Direct rear view displaying the solid green back panel and the splayed wooden legs.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and segmented into horizontal padded sections, providing ergonomic support and a modern visual rhythm. It is fully upholstered in gray fabric and extends seamlessly from the seat.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present, giving the chaise an open and minimalist appearance.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are angular, splayed, and constructed from medium-toned wood, intersecting at sharp angles for a contemporary look. They are sturdy and visually striking, with no decorative carvings or embellishments.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid gray with a segmented, ribbed texture created by horizontal stitching, giving the surface a quilted appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: The chaise features a single, continuous cushion that is segmented into several horizontal sections, all attached to the frame. There are no loose or additional cushions visible.
